cash_lock_scaling_probe.basis: Replay S199 fill opportunities with actual ask prices/outcomes and simulated cash locked until settlement_delay_minutes after market close. This is a sizing probe, not a replacement for Nautilus L2 replay.
cash_lock_scaling_probe.recommended_live_trade_size_for_8_usd: 2 conservative; 4 is aggressive because 60m settlement delay left only 0.079 pUSD free in the probe and was confirmed by a partial Nautilus replay.

caveats: Historical backtest performance is not a live-return guarantee.
Daily stop was validated in the chunked backtest runner; live sandbox entry should be monitored until an equivalent live risk stop is implemented.
The promoted profile keeps the learned logistic coefficients from S150 and narrows execution to the S199-validated policy.
deployment_profile.description: BTC 5m Polymarket snapshot classifier profile promoted from S199 continuous Nautilus/Telonex L2 replay.

hypothesis: BTC 5m UP probability should improve when Telonex Binance BTC momentum/volatility is combined with Telonex Polymarket YES/NO book imbalance and microprice. The selected trading policy is chosen on the training window and then replayed unchanged on the forward holdout with $20 cash.
name: btc_snapshot_model_s199_cost101_daily_stop120_profile
